problem: Images used purely for decoration or layout did not include empty alt attributes.
fix_applied: Added alt='' to these images to indicate they are not part of the content.

problem: No accessible label for the dropdown menu to describe its purpose.
fix_applied: Added aria-label='Quick navigation menu' to assistive technology users.

problem: The site does not warn users that selecting an option will navigate away.
fix_applied: Used accessible labels to inform users about the operation.

problem: Font tags were being used directly with color and size attributes for styling.
fix_applied: Converted <font> tags to <span> elements with CSS styling to separate content from presentation.
Removed deprecated attributes from <script> tags and corrected JavaScript code to use 'getFullYear()' instead of 'getYear()'.

problem: Links lacked a descriptive purpose and used JavaScript hijacks.
fix_applied: Replaced 'javascript:' links with normal href links directly to target pages.

problem: Inline JavaScript that modifies style using deprecated attributes.
fix_applied: Changed JavaScript to modify CSS style properties using `style` attribute.

problem: Images missing appropriate alt text describing the chart.
fix_applied: Added descriptive alt text to images that convey important information.
Added `lang='en'` to the HTML tag to specify the document's language is English.
